description: IntentClass Registry (ICR) — closed enum governing cap.action to intentClass and NRLevel mappings. Adding values requires an ADR. Removing or redefining values is a breaking change requiring a new ICR version. The version string here is embedded verbatim in the signature domain separator: PHASE_MIRROR/WITNESS/v1/icr:2.0.0

intentClasses.description: State-changing operation; executor is the agent of a side effect
Observation without state change; audit or trace role
Acknowledgement of delivery; no independent state change
Telemetry or provenance record; evidentiary only

nrLevels.description: Governance-relevant actuation: regulated, multi-party, or legal accountability context. SPIFFE SVID required for aud.instance. Audit trail non_repudiation = instance-bound.
Non-governance actuation: internal, development, or non-regulated context. Class-level DID binding sufficient. Audit trail non_repudiation = class-bound.
Witness, receipt, or trace-atom operations. No instance binding required. Audit trail non_repudiation = evidentiary-only.

actions._comment: Placeholder — initial cap.action entries to be populated via ICR governance process before ADR-032 moves to ACCEPTED. Each entry must specify: action (string), intentClass (enum above), nr_level (enum above), added_by_adr (string), added_date (ISO-8601).

governance.removingValues: Breaking change. Requires new ICR version and new ADR.
governance.redefiningValues: Breaking change. Requires new ICR version and new ADR.
governance.nrLevelAssignment: NRLevel is assigned by the ICR governance process, not by the signer or executor. A signer cannot declare a lower NRLevel than the ICR assigns to the action.
